[[Logray/Legends|Logray's]] '''crystal image spinner''' was a device which could be used to observe the happenings of other locations on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. At it's heart was a crystal attuned to the force, which, when manipulated by a force user could be used to reveal images seen otherwise only through the force.

{{Tech-stub}}
